personal.name: Shreesh Kulkarni
personal.title: Software Engineer | Supply Chain Specialist
personal.subtitle: MSCS @ Northeastern University | 4.0 GPA
personal.bio: Specializing in the intersection of Supply Chain Tech and AI. I build high-availability systems that bridge the gap between complex algorithms and physical operations.

highlights: Migrated legacy Blue Yonder WMS to cloud-native microservices.
Engineered trailer scheduling logic reducing RDC demurrage costs.
Deployed 99.9% uptime services via Kubernetes, Rancher, and Grafana.
Migrated infrastructure to AWS, cutting costs by 70% and improving reliability.
Automated manual workflows with Python scripts, minimizing task time and data errors.
Trained and mentored a cohort of interns through technical workshops and project-based assessments.

projects.name: CodeTutor

projects.description: Group movie recommender that collects everyone's preferences and uses semantic vector search to find the one film that fits the whole room.
